svg.text: STATE MANAGEMENT — NgRx Store (7 Feature Slices)
• landingPageInitialized → triggers board, boardList, template loads
• deleteBoardSuccess → cascading task removal in idea-task reducer
• activityActions → updates task completion_status in idea-task reducer
Facade Services (TaskService, BoardService, etc.) wrap store dispatch + selectors for views
• No NgRx slice — direct service calls
Data flow: Views → dispatch Actions → Effects → API Services → Supabase → Response → Reducer → State → Selectors → Views
Angular 19 · TypeScript · NgRx 21 · RxJS · Angular Material / CDK
